code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut sum = 0
mut i = 0
mut done = false

while not done
  mut skipping = true
  while skipping
    if i >= n
      skipping = false
    else
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
          i = i + 1
        else
          skipping = false
        end
      when None
        skipping = false
      end
    end
  end

  if i >= n
    done = true
  else
    mut token = ""
    mut reading = true
    while reading
      if i >= n
        reading = false
      else
        match string.byte_at(input, i)
        when Some(b)
          if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
            reading = false
          else
            token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
            i = i + 1
          end
        when None
          reading = false
        end
      end
    end

    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      if v < 0
        done = true
      else
        sum = sum + v
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
end

print("partial=#{sum}")
